data.name: ForgotPasswordIntro
data.value: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.

data.name: MembersDashboardDescription
data.value: Browse, add and manage all members, addresses and seniority dates.

data.name: SettingsDashboardDescription
data.value: Manage company info, logo, custom fields, users and permissions.

data.name: StockDashboardDescription
data.value: Manage stock, log movements and review stock history.

data.name: LoginMissingCredentials
data.value: Please enter both username and password.

data.name: LoginGenericError
data.value: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

data.name: PasswordMinimumLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: ForgotPasswordSuccess
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

data.name: PasswordResetCompleted
data.value: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

data.name: SettingsPageDescription
data.value: Manage application configuration, custom fields and users.

data.name: CompanyNameDescription
data.value: Displayed in exports and PDF headers.

data.name: LogoDescription
data.value: PNG, JPEG or GIF - max 2 MB. Used in PDF exports.

data.name: DownloadMemberDataDescription
data.value: Choose fields and format, then download.

data.name: NoCustomFieldsDescription
data.value: Add custom fields to extend member profiles.

data.name: RejectRegistrationConfirm
data.value: Reject and delete this registration request?

data.name: NoActiveUsersDescription
data.value: Approve pending requests to add users.

data.name: StockReadOnlyDescription
data.value: You can view and export stock but cannot add, edit or delete.

data.name: NoItemsDescription
data.value: Use the form to add a first stock item.

data.name: ExportStockDescription
data.value: Exports all stock items including category, quantity and status. Excel contains an extra worksheet with the category summary.

data.name: UserManagementDescription
data.value: Create, manage and control access for all admin users.

data.name: CreateUserOrApprovePending
data.value: Create a user or approve a pending request.

data.name: AuditLogsDescription
data.value: All user activity - logins, member changes, settings updates and more.

data.name: ManageProfileAndSecurity
data.value: Manage your profile and security settings.

data.name: TwoFactorEnabledDescription
data.value: Your account is protected with an authenticator app. Devices you trust will skip the code for 30 days.

data.name: TwoFactorSetupDescription
data.value: Add an extra layer of security. Use Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator or any TOTP app.

data.name: AuthenticatorSetupDescription
data.value: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator or any compatible TOTP app.

data.name: CantScanEnterKeyManually
data.value: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:

data.name: EnterSixDigitCodeDescription
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your app to activate two-factor authentication.

data.name: TwoFactorActiveDescription
data.value: Your account is protected. You will be asked for a code on each new device or after 30 days.

data.name: EnterAuthenticatorCode
data.value: Enter the code from your authenticator app

data.name: UnexpectedErrorOccurred
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact your administrator.

data.name: PasswordUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update password. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFactorEnabledSuccessfully
data.value: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully.

data.name: SessionExpiredSignInAgain
data.value: Session expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: DeleteCustomFieldConfirm
data.value: Delete this custom field? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Disable2FADescription
data.value: This will disable two-factor authentication. Are you sure?

data.name: MembersReadOnlyDescription
data.value: You can view and export members but cannot add, edit or delete.

data.name: UseFormToAddFirst
data.value: Use the form to add your first member.

data.name: NoResultsTryDifferent
data.value: No results - try a different search.

data.name: ImportCSVDescription
data.value: Supported: comma or semicolon separator. First row = headers.

data.name: BulkUpdateDescription
data.value: Select members below, choose what to update, then click Apply.

data.name: BulkOnlyFilled
data.value: Only filled fields will be updated.

data.name: ClickOrDragUpload
data.value: Click or drag a file to upload

data.name: UploadFileTypes
data.value: PDF, Word, Excel, images - max 20 MB

data.name: DeleteDocConfirm
data.value: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Force2FATitle
data.value: Force this user to enrol in 2FA on next login

data.name: Force2FAConfirm
data.value: Force 2FA for {0}? Their existing TOTP will be reset and they must re-enrol.

data.name: PermanentlyDeleteConfirm
data.value: Permanently delete {0}? This cannot be undone.

data.name: RejectRegistrationConfirm2
data.value: Reject and remove this registration request?

data.name: NoPermissionModifyMembers
data.value: You do not have permission to modify members.

data.name: FirstLastNameRequired
data.value: First name and last name are required.

data.name: MemberNumberInUse
data.value: Member number {0} is already in use.

data.name: ErrorSaving
data.value: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.

data.name: NoPermissionDeleteMembers
data.value: You do not have permission to delete members.

data.name: ErrorDeleting
data.value: An error occurred while deleting. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFANowRequired
data.value: 2FA is now required for this user. Their existing TOTP has been reset so they must re-enrol.

data.name: PasswordMin6
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: CannotDeleteOwnAccount
data.value: You cannot delete your own account.

data.name: CannotDeleteSuperAdmin
data.value: Only a Super Admin can delete another Super Admin.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneFieldExport
data.value: Select at least one field to export.

data.name: ChooseFieldToUpdate
data.value: Choose at least one field to update.

data.name: DeleteEventConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

data.name: EmailSettingsDescription
data.value: Configure the email provider used for sending password resets and notifications.

data.name: EmailProviderDescription
data.value: Choose how the application authenticates with your email server.

data.name: SmtpHostDescription
data.value: The hostname of the SMTP server (e.g. smtp.sendgrid.net).

data.name: UseSslDescription
data.value: Enable StartTLS encryption for the SMTP connection.

data.name: SmtpPasswordDescription
data.value: SMTP login password. Leave empty to keep the current value.

data.name: ApiKeyDescription
data.value: The API key from your email provider (e.g. SendGrid). Leave empty to keep the current value.

data.name: FromAddressDescription
data.value: The sender email address shown to recipients.

data.name: FromNameDescription
data.value: The sender display name shown to recipients.

data.name: RecipientEmailDescription
data.value: Enter an email address to send a test message to.

data.name: FeatureRequestsDescription
data.value: Submit feature requests and let AI agents analyze feasibility and create an architectural plan.

data.name: RequestTitleDescription
data.value: A short summary of what you need.

data.name: RequestTitlePlaceholder
data.value: e.g. Add bulk import for members

data.name: RequestDescriptionHelp
data.value: Describe the feature in detail — what, why, and any constraints.

data.name: RequestDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the feature you would like, the problem it solves, and any technical details…

data.name: RequestSubmitted
data.value: Request submitted! AI analysis has been triggered.

data.name: StepSubmitDesc
data.value: Describe your feature request using the form above.

data.name: StepAnalyzeDesc
data.value: Agent 1 classifies the request, determines category and priority.

data.name: StepArchitectDesc
data.value: Agent 2 assesses feasibility and produces a detailed architectural plan.

data.name: DeleteFeatureRequestConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this feature request?

data.name: AwaitingAi
data.value: AI analysis is in progress. Results will appear here once the GitHub Action completes.

data.name: AiSettingsDescription
data.value: Configure the GitHub integration that powers AI-driven feature request analysis.

data.name: GitHubOwnerDescription
data.value: The GitHub user or organisation that owns the repository.

data.name: GitHubRepoDescription
data.value: The name of the GitHub repository.

data.name: GitHubTokenDescription
data.value: A personal access token with workflow dispatch permission. Leave empty to keep the current value.

data.name: BoardReportsDashboardDescription
data.value: Manage, create and export board meeting reports

data.name: BoardReportDeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this report?
